query:
-- Janeiro 2026
SELECT 'Janeiro 2026' as mes, COUNT(*) as total_baixas FROM properfyProperties 
WHERE chrTransactionType = 'sale' 
AND chrStatus = 'REMOVED'
AND dteTermination IS NOT NULL
AND dteTermination >= '2026-01-01' AND dteTermination <= '2026-01-31'
UNION ALL
-- Fevereiro 2026
SELECT 'Fevereiro 2026', COUNT(*) FROM properfyProperties 
WHERE chrTransactionType = 'sale' 
AND chrStatus = 'REMOVED'
AND dteTermination IS NOT NULL
AND dteTermination >= '2026-02-01' AND dteTermination <= '2026-02-28'
UNION ALL
-- Março 2026
SELECT 'Março 2026', COUNT(*) FROM properfyProperties 
WHERE chrTransactionType = 'sale' 
AND chrStatus = 'REMOVED'
AND dteTermination IS NOT NULL
AND dteTermination >= '2026-03-01' AND dteTermination <= '2026-03-31'
